name: Dggb - Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup chicken, turkey, beef, pork, or sausage (cooked and diced)
1 large can Red Kidney beans, drained
2 medium Granny Smith apples, cored, peeled, diced
1 large yellow, white, or purple onion, diced
2 tablespoons Liquid Hickory Smoke flavoring, to taste
2 cups your favorite BBQ Sauce, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Open and drain the three cans of beans, reserving half the liquid from the Pork N Beans if desired.
2. Place the beans in a colander and rinse them.
3. In a large stockpot, heat 1/2 cup of the reserved Pork N Bean liquid or small can of Tomato sauce on Medium Low.
4. Add the cooked meat (you can use a combination of meats; turkey and sausage work well), diced into bite-sized chunks (about 1 inch x 1 inch).
5. Add the chiles, apples, and onions. Stir to mix.
6. Simmer until the mixture comes to a gentle boil.
7. Add 1-2 tablespoons Liquid Smoke.
8. Add 1/4 to 1/3 cup Pancake/Waffle syrup.
9. When the mixture is very thick, add enough BBQ Sauce to achieve a thick, stew-like consistency. The cooking liquid from apples and onions will slightly thin it out; avoid excess moisture to prevent scorching.
10. Stir often and cook slowly. Adjust with more BBQ Sauce if needed.
11. Simmer for about an hour, or until you're hungry and ready to serve.
This recipe is inspired by the beans served at one of my favorite barbecue rib restaurants in Houston: Goodes Barbecue.
